title: Cozy Magic (Cozy Clothing)
description: 3D Modeled clothing: 2 pair of cat ears(for now), 1 devil horns and 2 fur coats with complex craft. Coming soon: more types of clothing and accessories, create mod integration.
body:
• For now a small magic mod, adding 1 devil horns, 2 cat ears, 2 fur coats clothing with complex crafts(more coming soon).
  • JEI required to get recipes.

What's going on

  • Rebranded because i want to rebranch this mod into clothing branch to add some non minecraft styled clothing alongside this one but without crafts, for RP purposes.

 Plans on this mod

  • Add integration with Create mod.
  • Mobs, like bear, fox hunter(+ structure: hideout).
  • More type of accessories and clothing(as mod's name)
  • Feel free to suggest some ideas in Discord or check dev peeks.

 (Canceled)Not prioritized ideas of mod

  • Add animations depending on weather.
    Some issues, i'll try to do something in future.
  • Try to make some integrations with other (rpg) mods.
    Not prioritized.

Known issues

  • Not that different from other MCreator mods(for now).
  • Clothing not rendering while in Epic Fight's battle mode.

Q & A

  • Q: Fabric?
  • A: Fabric Generator in MCreator is atrophied, so i won't.
  • Q: Backports?
  • A: Studies.
  • Q: 1.21?
  • A: As soon as it releases, and I'll get free time.

Discord Profile | Who wanna help, (or meow in voice at 01 am(girlz only))
